nodes.label: Claude Sonnet 4.6 (Primary Reasoning Model)
nodes.rationale: Balance calidad/costo para conversación B2B. Used for tool use and lead responses. Fallback to Opus 4.7/4.8 if Sonnet fails on complex multi-tool cases.

nodes.label: Claude Haiku 4.5 (Intent Classification Model)
nodes.rationale: ~7x cheaper than Sonnet, sufficient for intent classification (e.g. 'is this a price question?'). Only reconsidered if latency <500ms becomes critical.

nodes.label: ADR 005 — Dual Model Strategy
nodes.rationale: Use Sonnet 4.6 for reasoning/tool-use and Haiku 4.5 for cheap/fast classification to optimize cost and latency.

nodes.label: ADR 006 — Mercado Pago Perú Payment Gateway
nodes.rationale: Accepts USD and PEN (Culqi only PEN), up to 12 installments with LATAM cards, mature Node SDK, robust webhook with x-idempotency-key, lower commission (4.59%+IGV vs Culqi 4.99%+IGV). Trade-off: UX is MP-branded, not white-label. Reconsidered if expanding to other LATAM countries or requiring white-label.
nodes.norm_label: adr 006 — mercado pago peru payment gateway

nodes.label: ADR 007 — Railway Deploy Platform
nodes.rationale: Auto-deploy from GitHub, ~$5/month for Phase 0, UI-managed env vars, native healthcheck at /health, structured logs in dashboard. Migrate to Fly.io/VPS if costs exceed $50/month, or to OCI/AWS with Terraform for compliance requirements.

nodes.label: HMAC SHA256 Signature Validation
nodes.rationale: Use crypto.timingSafeEqual() instead of === to prevent timing attacks that could leak the expected signature. try/catch handles different-length buffer throw.

nodes.label: Fire-and-Forget Async Processing Pattern
nodes.rationale: reply.code(200).send('ok') before processing to meet Meta's <5s requirement. BullMQ/Redis deferred to Phase 1 when volume justifies it. Risk: message loss if process dies between 200 and processing.

nodes.label: Fastify Raw Body Parser (addContentTypeParser)
nodes.rationale: Use Fastify native addContentTypeParser with parseAs: 'buffer' to retain raw body for HMAC validation. Rejects fastify-raw-body plugin as unnecessary wrapper.
